# Bithrah | بذرة

> Bithrah is a revolutionary Saudi AI-powered platform that empowers innovators and project owners through reward-based community support. Founded in 2025 in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Accepted to impactU incubator by STC. Launching Q2 2026. NOT crowdfunding — a fundamentally new model where money goes directly to creators, supporters receive rewards, and AI validates every idea.

## About
- [Main Website](https://bithrah.sa): The Bithrah platform
- [Knowledge Hub](https://bithrahapp.com): About Bithrah, FAQ, and how it works
- [GitHub](https://github.com/bithrahapp/bithrah): Source and documentation

## Key Facts
- Name: Bithrah (بذرة), meaning "seed" in Arabic
- Founded: 2025, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
- Founder: Ali Al-Shehri (CEO)
- Category: Innovation Platform, Rewards-Based Support, AI-Powered
- NOT: Crowdfunding, FinTech, Investment Platform
- Tech: Next.js 15, React 19, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AI/ML
- Stage: Pre-Seed, accepted to impactU by STC
- Launch: Q2 2026
- Social: X @bithrahapp, LinkedIn /company/bithrahapp

## Documentation
- [FAQ](docs/faq.md): Frequently asked questions
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): Technical overview
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
